title: Lebanon Day 28: 15 killed in Israeli drone strikes on Jiyeh highway — 8 killed (2 children) south of Beirut
snippet: May 14: At least 15 killed in Israeli attacks across Lebanon. 8 people including 2 children killed in 3 drone attacks on key Beirut-south highway near Jiyeh, 20km south of Beirut. National News Agency reported. Day 28 of ceasefire.
tag_reason: May 14 Lebanon strikes — new daily casualties
